cards.back: A step-by-step procedure for solving a problem or performing a task
The process of breaking down complex problems into smaller, more manageable parts and finding efficient solutions
A fundamental algorithm that is used as a building block to construct more complex algorithms

cards.front: What is the Big O notation?
cards.back: A measure of an algorithm's efficiency, indicating the amount of time or space it requires as the input size increases

cards.front: What is the time complexity of an algorithm?
cards.back: A measure of how long an algorithm takes to complete, usually expressed in terms of the input size (Big O notation)
